title: Active .context is the pi-context dev substrate, not a clean baseline for the operation-framework port
body: The WASC operation-framework port (PHASE-PORT-OPS) needs a substrate baseline. The active .context is the pi-context development substrate, carrying its own 74 tasks / 101 gaps / 18 decisions / 14 stories and accumulated suboptimal content; it is not a clean baseline. Building the port on it co-mingles the port's PM state with the pi-context dev arc and inherits the suboptimal content.
